title: Fresh Flower Pots: Rotated
description: Add-on for Fresh Flower Pots with subtle random rotations
body:
![Fresh Flower Pots: Rotated Title Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7110009fbb9efbec044f24d6e336ce4a223f3f81.png)

## 📜 ABOUT This add-on for [Fresh Flower Pots](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-flower-pots) gives flower pots a subtle random rotation for a more natural and varied look. Requires Fresh Flower Pots and should be placed above it in the resource packs list. **Works beautifully alongside my other vanilla-friendly [resource packs](https://modrinth.com/user/BlueHDGaming/resourcepacks).**
![Fresh Flower Pots: Rotated Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bca519ebb02e28c04ed6bb5bbc1afedfcdf132fa.webp)
